rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Voide Judgment (Code Civ. Proc. 473, Subd.(D))
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT PAUL KRAAIJVANGER Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Voide Judgment (Code Civ. Proc. 473, Subd.(D)) is DENIED; The Statement of Damages served in sufficient time prior to the entry of the operative second default, i.e. prior to December 14, 2015 hearing. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT A. IMHOFF VS. JOSE MENENDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JOSE MENENDEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to provide competent admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. IRMA G. MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ROCIO CELIS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. No Order Shortening Time on file. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA PALACIO VS. RICARDO MEZA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT RICARDO MEZA, AARON MEZA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify the inconsistency regarding existence of a tenancy (paragraph 14 of the Complaint vs. Notice). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA, PRISCILLA SILVA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff complied with the Ellis Act and SFRO requirements as to notification re: date of termination of tenancy. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: TABERNACLE VISTA APARTMENTS VS. DONALD FRANKLIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT DONALD FRANKLIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed on September 27, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. IVONNA MORALES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 11, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT EDUARDO MEJIA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on October 4, 2016. =(501/SRB)
